title: "ERROR: Assert `count_id(wire->name) == 0' failed in kernel/rtlil.cc:2143" when using synth_{ice40,ecp5} on simple design

features.name: process with sync always and multiple case branches
features.description: Code should include a process block with sync always statement and multiple switch case branches including empty cases
features.snippet:
process $proc$test
assign $0\$15[10:0] $2\$15[10:0]
switch $delete_wire$74
case 1'1
case
endswitch
sync always
update \$15 $0\$15[10:0]
end

features.name: wire names with backslash in internal naming
features.description: Code should include internal wire names containing backslash characters like $15 that can cause name collision during synthesis

features.name: adder cell with mismatched port widths
features.description: Code should include an $add cell where result width exceeds input widths causing potential bit-width mismatch

features.name: partial register update with sync control
features.description: Code should include a register update pattern where only some bits are updated conditionally based on switch statements
features.snippet:
sync always
update \$18 $0\$18[19:0]$46
# nested: switch $delete_wire$69
#   case 1'1
#     assign $1\$18[19:0]$47 $2\$18[19:0]$48
